text: After Easter, Trump issued a stark 12-hour ultimatum, warning Iran a “civilization” would be destroyed if no deal was reached. Behind the scenes, aides—including Marco Rubio—saw it as a pressure tactic to force negotiations. Trump’s goal, advisers said, was to intimidate Iran into ending the war. Source: WSJ

Trump is privately grappling with the risk of sending troops into danger, knowing some won’t return. He has resisted plans to seize Kharg Island—despite assurances of success—because he fears the operation would lead to heavy U.S. casualties, warning soldiers would be “sitting ducks.” Source: WSJ

Trump: Whether people like Israel or not, they have proven to be a GREAT Ally of the United States of America. They are Courageous, Bold, Loyal, and Smart and, unlike others that have shown their true colors in a moment of conflict and stress, Israel fights hard, and knows how to WIN!

JD Vance: Pope Leo preaches the gospel, as he should, and that will inevitably mean he offers his opinions on the moral issues of the day. The President–and the entire administration–work to apply those moral principles in a messy world. He will be in our prayers, and I hope that we'll be in his.

🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ Qalibaf: On some issues, we insist and these demands are non-negotiable.bThese issues are one or two. They also have red lines. Overall, it must be said that we have made progress but the gaps are still large The enemy is definitely still there ready to ambush us. All its efforts are to break the unity and solidarity of the people. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Qalibaf on negotiations in Pakistan: Mr. Vance told me he came in good faith. I told him in my tweet, which you also read, that we also came in good faith but have no trust in you. First, you must build trust. No negotiations took place before the ceasefire. Trump is a master of lying. They say psychological warfare. He posted 8 tweets, 7 of which were lies. The issue of releasing frozen funds was also among our demands that had to be resolved, and we said if these two (Ceasefire in Lebanon & Iran's frozen funds) issues are not resolved, we will not enter into discussions about the other 10 points. These negotiations did not resolve our distrust, but both the American delegation and we gained a more realistic understanding of each other Some issues in the negotiations have been concluded, some have not. We are still far from a final agreement. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The Investigative Committee of Russia classifies the actions of Ukrainian armed formations in the Donetsk and Lugansk People's Republics as genocide As a result, since 2014, nearly 5,000 civilians have been killed and more than 13,000 have been injured, according to the Investigative Committee of Russia. Charges have been brought against 41 representatives of Ukraine's top political and military leadership. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ Qalibaf on the situation in Strait of Hormuz: I should also say that today the Strait of Hormuz is under the control of the Islamic Republic of Iran. When the US wanted to send a minesweepers, we announced that if they send it, we will shoot them, and get back to war. My brother Mr. Abdollahi said that the American minesweepers are in an area where if it moves forward, we will strike it. We told the American side they had 15 minutes to turn back, and they were ordered to return and did so. Now it has been 2 or 3 days that they have blockaded so that everyone goes and Iran does not go. This is a reckless decision. How can everyone go and we do not? This is not possible. If they do not lift the blockade, traffic restrictions will definitely be imposed in the strait. We also told Mr. Asim Munir, the commander of the Pakistan Army, that the other side should not do anything to break the ceasefire. Each of us has a commitment and must fulfill it there. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 The Speaker of Iranian Parliament General Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf on Lebanon: Hezbollah has been fighting the Zionist regime for many years, but the recent war was carried out by Hezbollah because of Iran, and the resistance front came to the aid of the Islamic Republic, so the ceasefire must definitely include them as well. They wanted passage through in the strait to become normal; we too have been seeking that from the start, but our condition was that a ceasefire be established in Lebanon. The Prime Minister and President of Lebanon, who are affiliated with the US, made some statements but the ceasefire with Hezbollah was part of our agreement with the US. We warned that if the ceasefire was not implemented, in one hour we would strike Israel with missiles. Israel said to hit 9 other locations in Beirut and then the ceasefire would happen. We said if you hit, we will hit you too. The ceasefire was established in Lebanon at that moment. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ Qalibaf: They started with threats, saw it didn't work, then sent a 15 points plan from some channels whose names I won't mention, we ignored them too, and finally on the 36th day of the war, Pakistan officially requested a ceasefire and negotiations on the behalf of America. The decisions were conveyed to the supreme leader instantly, which led me to say that we don't accept those 15 points plan, but these 10 points plan exist; if you agree, let's discuss this matter. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ 卡利巴夫：他们一开始进行威胁，发现没用，然后通过一些我不便透露名称的渠道发来了一份15点计划，我们也无视了它们。最终在战争的第36天，巴基斯坦代表美国正式请求停火并进行谈判。这些决定立即传达给了最高领袖，这导致我说我们不接受那份15点计划，但这份10点计划是存在的；如果你同意，我们来讨论这个问题。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ Qalibaf: (We told them) If you hit our infrastructures, we will hit the Americans' infrastructures as well, and other countries will also be affected. (We told them) If you hit our oil wells, why should the Americans be able to use the region's oil? Here, (Trump's )threats have become ineffective. They said they would hit the infrastructure, and we said you are doing the wrong thing, but if you hit it, we will hit back too. They said they would create hell, which is true, it may harm us, but we said before it harms us, it will harm you and your soldiers.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ 卡利巴夫：（我们告诉他们）如果你打击我们的基础设施，我们也会打击美国人的基础设施，其他国家也会受到影响。（我们告诉他们）如果你打击我们的油井，为什么美国人还能使用该地区的石油？在这里，（特朗普的）威胁已经失效。他们说要打击基础设施，我们说你们在做错误的事，但如果你们真的打击了，我们也会反击。他们说要制造地狱，这确实是真的，可能会伤害我们，但我们说在伤害我们之前，它会先伤害你们和你们的士兵。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Qalibaf: Some think we destroyed them, but that's not true, but in this war, we are the winners on the ground. Certainly, equipment and money are important in war, but they are not always effective. They had these but lacked the power to use them. We succeeded in asymmetric warfare. America's first slogan has become 'Israel first. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 卡利巴夫：有些人认为我们摧毁了他们，但事实并非如此，但在这次战争中，我们在地面上是赢家。当然，装备和金钱在战争中很重要，但它们并不总是有效的。他们拥有这些，但缺乏使用它们的能力。我们在非对称战争中取得了成功。美国的第一个口号已经变成了“以色列优先”。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Qalibaf: In the previous war, we were vulnerable regarding the launchers, but not in this war 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 卡利巴夫：在上一次战争中，我们在发射装置方面很脆弱，但在这次战争中并非如此。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Qalibaf: In the technical field, we hit about 180 drones, which we did not have such capability in air defense in the previous war. All these events have happened in a few months. Hitting the F-35 is not an accident; with the missile that exploded near that plane (F-35), the enemy understood what capability we have and which direction we are heading. Of course, it should be said that they were seeking a ceasefire. We also accepted it to achieve our rights. Our main goal should be to pursue the rights of the nation within this framework. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 卡利巴夫：在技术领域，我们击落了大约180架无人机，我们在上一次战争中没有这样的防空能力。所有这些事件都在几个月内发生了。击中F-35并非偶然；随着在那架飞机（F-35）附近爆炸的导弹，敌人明白了我们拥有什么能力以及我们正朝着什么方向前进。当然，应该说他们当时正在寻求停火。我们也接受了它以实现我们的权利。我们的主要目标应该是在此框架内追求民族的权利。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Speaker of Iranian Parliament General Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf in his address to Iranian people: - We have not destroyed the enemy, but we definitely have the upper hand on the field because the US and the Zionist regime have not achieved their goals - Certainly, in the third imposed war, in the offensive and defensive fields, we are stronger than before, and we saw it on the battlefield. - Today, our people are more active than in the previous war; it has now been nearly 50 nights that they have been on the streets every day. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫将军在对伊朗人民的讲话中表示：- 我们没有摧毁敌人，但我们绝对在战场上占据上风，因为美国和犹太复国主义政权没有实现他们的目标。- 当然，在第三次强加的战争中，在进攻和防御领域，我们比以前更强大，我们在战场上看到了这一点。- 今天，我们的人民比上一次战争时更加活跃；现在已经快50个夜晚了，他们每天都在街上。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🐻 Grab a coffee and read all the key news of the past 24 hours : ➡️ Belarusian President Lukashenko states that he always knows which side he is on ➡️ The IRGC intelligence service arrested members of espionage cells from the USA, Israel, and the UK ➡️ Russia develops a unique anti-drone net ➡️ China has filed a formal protest with Japan after the destroyer JS Ikazuchi transited the Taiwan Strait ➡️ Sergei Lavrov comments on the terrible situation with energy in Europe , explains Russia's position on red lines , and says that negotiations with Ukraine isn't their top priority ➡️ Brazilian President da Silva has criticised Donald Trump ➡️ A transformer exploded in Kiev, causing power outages ➡️ India expressed deep concern to Iran over firing on Indian merchant ships in Strait of Hormuz ➡️ Iranian Parliament Speaker announces that Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz , explains why they included Lebanon in the ceasefire , and says the US was definitely the one wanting a ceasefire . He also reveals if the Islamabad talks have led to anything ➡️ Mass protests continue in Ireland over soaring fuel prices ➡️ Italian Deputy Prime Minister Matteo Salvini has called for resuming Russian gas imports ➡️ Maria Zakharova explains that most people are not aware of the number of people the USSR lost during WW2 ➡️ Trump praises Israel for being a great ally 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 喝杯咖啡，阅读过去24小时的所有关键新闻：➡️ 白俄罗斯总统卢卡申科表示，他始终知道自己站在哪一边 ➡️ 伊斯兰革命卫队情报部门逮捕了来自美国、以色列和英国的间谍小组成员 ➡️ 俄罗斯开发了一种独特的反无人机网 ➡️ 在日本“雷”号驱逐舰穿越台湾海峡后，中国向日本提出了正式抗议 ➡️ 谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫评论了欧洲糟糕的能源状况，解释了俄罗斯在红线问题上的立场，并表示与乌克兰的谈判不是他们的首要任务 ➡️ 巴西总统达席尔瓦批评了唐纳德·特朗普 ➡️ 基辅一个变压器爆炸，导致停电 ➡️ 印度就霍尔木兹海峡向印度商船开火一事向伊朗表示深切关注 ➡️ 伊朗议会议长宣布伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，解释了他们为何将黎巴嫩纳入停火协议，并表示美国绝对是想要停火的一方。他还透露了伊斯兰堡的会谈是否取得了任何成果 ➡️ 爱尔兰因燃料价格飙升继续举行大规模抗议活动 ➡️ 意大利副总理马泰奥·萨尔维尼呼吁恢复俄罗斯天然气进口 ➡️ 玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃解释说，大多数人并不知道苏联在二战中损失的人数 ➡️ 特朗普称赞以色列是一个伟大的盟友 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Ghalibaf Recounts Tense Standoff: Iran Warned US Minesweeper “Move Forward and We Will Shoot” – They Asked for 15 Minutes, Then Turned Back 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 加利巴夫讲述紧张对峙：伊朗警告美国扫雷舰“再向前一步我们就开火”——他们要求15分钟时间，然后掉头离开 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇧🇬 Bulgaria is voting in a parliamentary election with former president Rumen Radev leading polls at around 35%, well ahead of the GERB party. Radev has called for closer ties with Russia and an end to political instability, while voters remain focused on corruption and rising living costs. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇧🇬 保加利亚正在进行议会选举，前总统鲁门·拉德夫在民调中以约35%的支持率领先，遥遥领先于保加利亚公民党（GERB）。拉德夫呼吁与俄罗斯建立更紧密的关系并结束政治不稳定，而选民们仍然关注腐败和不断上涨的生活成本。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: U.S. President Trump furiously yelled at his aides when he was informed that a U.S. fighter jet had been shot down, ordering the military to go get the missing pilots immediatley. However, aides kept Trump out of the room during the search and rescue operation believing that his impatience would be unhelpful. The fear of putting troops in harms way has loomed over Trump's head. It is the primarly reason he resisted an operation to capture Kharg island, which he was told would be successful, but feared it would lead to unacceptably high U.S. casualties. He said the troops would be sitting ducks. U.S. officials are confident a deal can be reached soon, eyeing further talks in Pakistan. A White House official explained Trump's 'Praise be to Allah' post was Trump trying to seem as unstable an insulting as possible to bring the Iranians to the negotiating table. While Trump was sold on the war by Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and discussions with top allies such as Sen. Lindsey Graham, the U.S. public was not. Depsite being shown poor polling numbers for the midterms, Trump believed that this was an opportunity to change the world order in a way he couldn't in his first term. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国总统特朗普在得知一架美国战斗机被击落后，愤怒地对助手大吼大叫，命令军方立即去营救失踪的飞行员。然而，助手们在搜救行动期间将特朗普挡在房间外，认为他的急躁无济于事。让部队陷入危险的恐惧一直笼罩在特朗普心头。这是他抵制夺取哈尔克岛行动的主要原因，尽管有人告诉他该行动会成功，但他担心这会导致美国伤亡过高。他说部队会成为活靶子。美国官员相信很快就能达成协议，并着眼于在巴基斯坦进行进一步会谈。一位白宫官员解释说，特朗普发布“赞美真主”的帖子是为了让他看起来尽可能不稳定和具有侮辱性，从而迫使伊朗人回到谈判桌前。虽然以色列总理内塔尼亚胡和与林赛·格雷厄姆参议员等高级盟友的讨论让特朗普相信了战争的必要性，但美国公众并不买账。尽管中期选举的民调数据不佳，但特朗普认为这是一个改变世界秩序的机会，这是他在第一个任期内无法做到的。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel IDF: An IDF reservist was killed and nine others were wounded, including one seriously, after an explosive device hit troops in southern Lebanon yesterday. The soldier is Sgt. First Class (res.) Lidor Porat, 31, from Ashdod, the military says. @manniefabian https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045706858929725809/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 IDF：一名预备役军人在昨天黎巴嫩南部的一次爆炸装置袭击中丧生，另有九人受伤，其中一人伤势严重。军方称，该士兵是来自阿什杜德的 31 岁的一级中士（预备役）利多尔·波拉特（Lidor Porat）。@manniefabian https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045706858929725809/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor WSJ reports Trump and his advisers saw a potential victory over Iran as a chance to reshape the world order. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 《华尔街日报》报道称，特朗普及其顾问将战胜伊朗视为重塑世界秩序的契机。推文

text: WarMonitor D.C. police were set to arrest Rep. Cory Mills (R-FL) after an assault allegation, but a lieutenant halted it when the accuser changed her story after speaking with him. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045699779728982133/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 华盛顿特区警方原定在接到袭击指控后逮捕众议员科里·米尔斯（佛罗里达州共和党籍），但一名中尉在指控者与他交谈后改变了说法时阻止了逮捕。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045699779728982133/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 A Israeli reservist soldier, Barak Kalphon, 48, from Adi, has died from wounds sustained in southern Lebanon yesterday. He was a fighter in the 7056 battalion of the 226th reserve paratrooper brigade. The incident occurred around 11:30am while…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF anounced that Sgt. First Class Lidor Porat was killed during operational activity near the village of Kila, close to Metula along the Lebanese border. Forces from Brigade 769 were operating along the front defence line to remove threats to northern Israel when an engineering D9 vehicle from Battalion 7106 struck an explosive device planted by Hezbollah, killing one, seriously injuring four and lightly injuring another four. The IDF said it is still investigating when the explosive device was placed and whether the incident constitutes a violation of the ceasefire arrangements. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 一名来自阿迪（Adi）、48岁的以色列预备役士兵巴拉克·卡尔丰（Barak Kalphon）因昨天在黎巴嫩南部受的伤而死亡。他是第226预备役伞兵旅第7056营的战士。事件发生在上午11:30左右，当时……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，一级中士利多尔·波拉特（Lidor Porat）在黎巴嫩边境梅图拉（Metula）附近的基拉（Kila）村附近执行行动时丧生。第769旅的部队当时正在前线防线执行任务，以消除对以色列北部的威胁，此时第7106营的一辆D9工程车撞上了真主党埋设的爆炸装置，造成一人死亡，四人重伤，另有四人轻伤。以色列国防军表示，目前仍在调查爆炸装置是何时放置的，以及该事件是否构成了对停火协议的违反。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor I just paid about $20 for 4 burger patties, and it's about to go even higher. Trump: "We're raising tariffs very soon" https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045684054549217585/video/1 - unusual_whales tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我刚才花了大约20美元买了4个汉堡肉饼，而且价格还要继续上涨。特朗普：“我们很快就会提高关税” https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045684054549217585/video/1 - unusual_whales 推文
